name: The Sphinx's Challenge
description:
Solve her riddle and she's yours. She'll worship your cock, eat your pussy, beg for more, let you use her however you want.

—

NO SPOILERS IN THE COMMENTS

USE A PROXY FOR BEST RESULTS

—

There’s 5 initial messages, each one with a unique riddle.

—

Hiiiiii!

I will be yapping a bit so a little heads up hehehe.

Hmmm yup. I think this is very much a niche, but oh welllllll. I’ve always loved riddles and since the lorebook/scripts have been introduced, I’ve wanted/been meaning to make a bot like this.

I plan on having 10 riddles, but you only get 5 for now (they aren’t that easy to make kay?) which each one having a slightly different reaction from our Sphinx (yes that’s also her name).

I’ve been thinking of putting the solutions here as spoilers but chose against it for now. Let me know if you’d think that be better?

It’s hard to gage the difficulty of these but I think there’s at least 2 of them that are easy. Feedback pleaseeeee.

The only downside is that I don’t get to solve these UGHHH.

have funnnnnnnnnn

(I fr hate how fantasy is included in the sci-fi tag. Oh and I will be debugging live so lmk if you find anything. )
creator: LovelyPirate
